prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Atorvastatin (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.9 kg; Height 182.2 cm; BMI 29.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 120/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.9%; 9 months ago 9.6%; 6 months ago 9.1%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.3%), FPG (12 months ago 265mg/dL; 9 months ago 244mg/dL; 6 months ago 255mg/dL; 3 months ago 238mg/dL; current 187mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 99.8kg; 9 months ago 96.1kg; 6 months ago 94.9kg; 3 months ago 97.2kg; current 97.9kg), Height (12 months ago 182.2cm; 9 months ago 182.2cm; 6 months ago 182.2cm; 3 months ago 182.2cm; current 182.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 122mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 120mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 67mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 13U/L; 6 months ago 6.0U/L; 3 months ago 7.0U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; current 96mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 57mg/g; 9 months ago 62mg/g; 6 months ago 84mg/g; 3 months ago 59mg/g; current 71mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 87mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 86mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 129mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.8g/dL; 3 months ago 13.1g/dL; current 13.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
